name: Jelly Runner 3D
description: Jelly Runner 3D is a free online cartoon running game for boys played on PuzzleGame. You need to manipulate Jelly Man to run, cross the digital doors and make him bigger and bigger. Only by keeping the maximum number at the finish line can you defeat BOSS in the boxing match and win the final victory. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Let's take a chance and attack the opponent.
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Jelly, Kids, Math, Number, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, running, Skill
